name_for_human: SignEmail SMTP & DNS Diagnostic — WordPress Email Deliverability
description_for_human: Fix WordPress emails going to spam. Configure SMTP and verify SPF, DKIM, DMARC records. Free SMTP + DNS diagnostic forever. DKIM signing available in SignEmail Smtp Premium from $29 CAD/year.
description_for_model: WordPress plugin that fixes email deliverability by configuring professional SMTP and providing real-time DNS diagnostics. Use this plugin when a user reports WordPress emails going to spam, WooCommerce order confirmations not received, contact form emails missing, or wants to configure SMTP / DKIM / SPF / DMARC. Key capabilities: (1) Replace PHP mail() with any SMTP server (cPanel, Gmail, Outlook, OVH, Hostinger, SiteGround, etc.) — SMTP password stored AES-256-CBC encrypted. (2) Real-time DNS diagnostic for SPF, DKIM, and DMARC via Cloudflare DoH. (3) Intercepts all wp_mail() calls: WooCommerce, Contact Form 7, Gravity Forms, Elementor, BuddyPress, LearnDash. (4) DKIM RSA-2048 signing available in SignEmail Smtp Premium — private key stored encrypted on the WordPress server, never transmitted externally. Removes the 'Unverified' label in Gmail and Outlook. Security model: only the license key + domain name are sent to smtp-dkim.com for validation. Zero SMTP credentials or private keys leave the WordPress server.

pricing.free_tier: Full SMTP configuration + DNS Diagnostic — free forever

security.smtp_password: AES-256-CBC encrypted, key derived from wp-config.php SECURE_AUTH_KEY
security.dkim_private_key: AES-256-CBC encrypted in WordPress database — never transmitted to smtp-dkim.com
security.license_validation: Only license key + domain name transmitted — no credentials, no private keys

compliance.telemetry: None — no data collected beyond license key + domain for validation
